title: Income Source
description: A recurring income source for pay schedule and cashflow calculations.

name.description: Income source name (e.g. Day Job, Freelance, Rental)

amount.description: Gross amount per pay period (or avg monthly for irregular)

source_type.description: Type of income source — drives rulepack selection

account_label.description: Account that receives this income (e.g. Personal Checking, Business Account)

is_regular.description: true for predictable paycheck, false for variable/irregular income

pay_dates.description: Day(s) of month for monthly/biweekly pay
